**Staff Narrative — Jordan, Order Processing Coordinator**

When an order lands on my desk for valid

diagrams.name: Order to Cash Process Conext Diagram

elements.label: V01 — Order to Cash Process Group

diagrams.name: V01 - Order to Cash Value Chain Diagram

properties.description:
• Capture order from customer
  • Log order details
  • Assign order reference
  • Acknowledge receipt to customer

• Verify customer identity
  • Validate order completeness
  • Confirm product or service codes
  • Flag missing or erroneous data

• Assess customer credit limit
  • Apply agreed pricing and discounts
  • Confirm payment terms
  • Escalate credit risk exceptions

• Check stock or capacity levels
  • Reserve inventory or resources
  • Communicate availability to customer
  • Initiate backorder if needed

• Pick, pack or provision service
  • Quality-check fulfilment
  • Generate despatch or service record
  • Update order status

• Schedule delivery or deployment
  • Coordinate logistics or service team
  • Obtain proof of delivery
  • Confirm customer receipt

• Generate invoice from order
  • Apply taxes and surcharges
  • Send invoice to customer
  • Record invoice in accounts receivable

• Monitor payment due dates
  • Process incoming payment
  • Match payment to invoice
  • Update accounts receivable ledger

• Reconcile bank receipts to invoices
  • Identify short payments or overpayments
  • Post reconciled entries
  • Report reconciliation status

• Log customer disputes or deductions
  • Investigate root cause
  • Negotiate resolution with customer
  • Issue credit note or collect balance

• Confirm all obligations fulfilled
  • Clear open items in ledger
  • Archive order and transaction records
  • Trigger customer satisfaction follow-up
